title: Petlicity Snuggle Padded Cat Radiator Bed - Machine Washable Fleece Cover and Foldable Arms Cat Hammock - Radiator Beds for Indoor Cats, Dogs and Small Pets - Beige
features: SNUGGLE-WORTHY COMFORT: The Petlicity Cat Radiator Bed wraps your cat in warmth and softness, with plush fleece and extra-padded edges for the cosiest naps on chilly days.
BUILT TO LAST: Crafted with a sturdy iron frame that supports up to 10kg — ideal for cats, kittens, and small pets who love a strong and stable radiator perch.
EASY TO HANG, SIMPLE TO STORE: Hooks securely over most standard radiators — no tools needed. Foldable arms let you store it flat, purr-fect for saving space between snuggles.
MACHINE WASHABLE COVER: The removable fleece cover makes cleaning easy — simply pop it in the wash to keep your cat’s radiator hammock fresh, soft, and inviting.
WHAT’S IN THE BOX: 1x Petlicity Snuggle Padded Cat Radiator Bed (50 x 35 x 25cm). A cosy, space-saving radiator bed for indoor cats, dogs, and small pets.
description: Product Description Soft material Easy storage Comfy & warm Hook it up! Previous page Next page 1 Quality first 2 Pet friendly 3 UK based What size pets is this bed suitable for? This radiator bed is designed for cats, kittens, and small dogs up to 5kg in weight. It’s perfect for all ages from curious kittens to snoozy seniors. Can I use this for small dogs or other pets? You can! While it’s designed for cats, small dogs, rabbits or ferrets under 5kg can enjoy the warmth and comfort too, just make sure they’re supervised. Will it fit on my radiator? Most likely, yes! The frame is designed to hook securely onto most standard radiator styles: no tools or DIY required. Does the bed get warm on its own? No, the bed itself isn’t heated but when hung over a radiator, it creates a naturally toasty spot by soaking up ambient warmth. Will it scratch or damage my radiator? Not at all. The hooks are smooth and designed to rest securely without causing marks or damage to your radiator’s surface.
